title: Beds But They're Cats
description: Ever wanted cat beds well now you can have them in minecraft!
body:
This mod is for all the cat lovers!
If you ever wanted beds to be cats you can now have beds with a cat texture

Heres what they all look like!


**All The Beds**


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c761161975ea76c2da940c4f80691028bebcf7e0.png)
------------------------------------------
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0038d91ddb0feb3cf640c01bdbc4c627bb61432a.png)

Brown Bed **Showcase**
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adc249ad52a48cd4bc3b32e8a3316fa9d09261d7.png)
Owners Choice!![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05a7e0667ce003b1823234df81b2c3c5d2ea0a6b.png)
**Note**
**We didn't add cats to all beds!**

More cat art will be added to the beds in the future*

Compatible with **More Bed Variants**

[https://modrinth.com/mod/more-bed-variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-bed-variants)
